data.title: QuinStreet Sets Date to Announce Fiscal Third Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: QuinStreet, Inc., a prominent player in performance marketplaces and technologies for financial services and home services sectors, is set to release its financial outcomes for the fiscal third quarter concluding on March 31, 2026, after market closure on Thursday, May 7, 2026. Following this release, a conference call and webcast is scheduled at 2:00 PM PT to delve into and analyze the company's performance. QuinStreet's stock trades on Nasdaq under the symbol QNST.

data.title: Microsoft is offering buyouts to around 7% of its U.S. workforce, aiming at long-serving workers to focus on AI.
data.description: In a strategic move, the technology company is providing early retirement options to its veteran employees as part of its ongoing commitment to substantial investment in artificial intelligence. This initiative aims to optimize operations and align workforce with evolving technology trends. The company's investment in AI is set to reach significant figures, showcasing its dedication to staying at the forefront of technological advancements.

data.title: Intel Stock Soars After Blockbuster Q1 Earnings: Here Are Details
data.description: Intel Corp.'s stock (NASDAQ: INTC) skyrocketed following the release of its first-quarter results, surpassing expectations. After the closing bell on Thursday, the company reported earnings of 29 cents per share, far exceeding the analyst consensus of one cent. Revenue for the quarter totaled $13.58 billion, surpassing the Street estimate by 9.28% and marking an increase from $12.67 billion in the same period last year. The strong performance is attributed to the advancement in AI technology, which is expected to bring intelligence closer to the end user. For further details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: BRAEMAR HOTELS & RESORTS DECLARES MONTHLY PREFERRED DIVIDENDS FOR APRIL 2026
data.description: Dallas-based Braemar Hotels & Resorts Inc. (NYSE: BHR) revealed today that its Board of Directors has approved a partial cash dividend for the company's 5.5% Series B Cumulative Convertible. This announcement was made on April 23, 2026.

data.title: Franklin Street Properties Corp. Announces Expansion of Strategic Alternatives Process
data.description: In Wakefield, Massachusetts, Franklin Street Properties Corp. (FSP), a real estate investment trust trading on NYSE MKT under FSP, disclosed the expansion of its strategic alternatives review to involve BofA Securities and JLL Securities as co-financial advisors. This move aims to bolster the company's assessment capacity.

data.title: Chimera Investment Corporation Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call Date
data.description: Chimera Investment Corporation has revealed its plans to announce its first quarter earnings for 2026, along with hosting a conference call. The company will share its financial results and insights from the quarter in question during the conference call. Stakeholders and investors are encouraged to participate in the call to gain a better understanding of the company's performance. This event will offer a comprehensive overview of Chimera Investment Corporation's financial standing and is scheduled for a specific date, although exact details were not provided in the rephrased content.

data.title: VICI Properties Inc. Announces Closing Date for Sale-Leaseback Transaction With Golden Entertainment
data.description: In New York, VICI Properties Inc. (NYSE: VICI) has successfully obtained all necessary gaming regulatory and shareholder approvals for its acquisition of the Golden Portfolio from Golden Entertainment, Inc. (NASDAQ: GDEN). The acquisition, valued at $1.16 billion, includes 100% ownership of the land, real property, and improvements of seven casino properties. VICI Properties anticipates closing the transaction by April 30, 2026.

data.title: Five Point Holdings, LLC Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Five Point Holdings, LLC, a California-based owner and developer of large mixed-use planned communities, released its first quarter 2026 results. The company's President and CEO, Dan Hedigan, stated that the first quarter was quiet in terms of land sales, aligning with their projection of closing transactions in the third and fourth quarters. Five Point is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol FPH.

data.title: World Kinect Corporation Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In Miami, World Kinect Corporation (NYSE: WKC) released their financial results for Q1 2026. The highlights include a gross profit of $271 million, with an adjusted gross profit of $254 million. The GAAP net income was $26 million, or $0.50 per diluted share, while the adjusted net income was $39 million, or $0.75 per diluted share. The adjusted EBITDA stood at $94 million. They also repurchased $75 million of common stock. In terms of reportable segments, the Aviation Segment showed growth in Q1 2026 compared to the previous year.

data.title: Walmart Releases 2026 Annual Report and Proxy Statement
data.description: Retail giant Walmart Inc. (Nasdaq: WMT) released its 2026 Annual Report and submitted its Proxy Statement ahead of the Annual Shareholders’ Meeting scheduled for June 4, 2026. The report featured the inaugural letter from Walmart's President and CEO, John Furner, showcasing optimism in the company's successful business strategies. Furner emphasized the significant investments made in employees and innovative AI technologies to enhance operations.

data.title: Clearwater Analytics to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 7, 2026
data.description: Boise, Idaho - Clearwater Analytics Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CWAN), a leading technology platform for investment management, is set to announce its financial results for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2026 after the close of U.S. financial markets on Thursday, May 7, 2026. The Company has entered into a Merger Agreement with an investor group spearheaded by Permira and Warburg Pincus for the acquisition of all outstanding shares. This deal signifies a significant milestone for CWAN and its shareholders.

data.title: PSQ Holdings Announces First Quarter 2026 Financial Results Release Date & Conference Call
data.description: PSQ Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: PSQH) disclosed plans to conduct a teleconference and webcast to review its first quarter 2026 performance, commencing at 9:00 a.m. EDT on Thursday, May 7, 2026. The Company is set to release its first quarter 2026 results on May 7, 2026, before the U.S. stock market opens. Interested parties can join the conference call live via a link on the PSQ Holdings Investor Relations website at investors.publicsquare.

data.title: Morgan Stanley Investment Management Launches Stablecoin Reserves Portfolio
data.description: Morgan Stanley Investment Management (MSIM) unveiled the introduction of the Stablecoin Reserves Portfolio (MSNXX) in New York today. The portfolio is incorporated within the Morgan Stanley Institutional Liquidity Funds trust. This new government money market fund has been developed to adhere to the stablecoin reserves investment stipulations outlined in the Guiding and Establishing National Innovation for U.S. Stablecoins Act (GENIUS Act). The Stablecoin Reserves Portfolio provides payment stablecoin issuers with a compliant option.

data.title: Phillips Edison & Company Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Phillips Edison & Company (Nasdaq: PECO) headquartered in Cincinnati, released their financial outcomes for the period concluding on March 31, 2026. The company, known for managing top-tier grocery-centered local shopping hubs, disclosed that their net income attributable to stockholders during the first quarter of 2026 was $30.4 million, equivalent to $0.24 per diluted share. Additionally, they also updated their projected earnings guidance for the entire fiscal year of 2026.

data.title: BeFra Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Betterware de México, S.A.P.I. de C.V. (NYSE:BWMX), also known as BeFra, disclosed its first-quarter 2026 financial outcomes in Guadalajara, Mexico. The data provided in this release is denoted in nominal Mexican Pesos (Ps.), per the Board of Directors' endorsement, following IFRS standards, possibly containing slight deviations due to rounding. The President and CEO commenced the year with a robust performance.

data.title: SAP Quarterly Statement Q1 2026
data.description: In Walldorf, Germany, on April 23, 2026, SAP SE (NYSE: SAP) released its first-quarter financial results for the period ending March 31, 2026. The current cloud backlog stands at €21.9 billion, reflecting a 20% increase and a 25% increase at constant currencies. Cloud revenue has also risen by 19% and 27% at constant currencies.
$SAP SAP Q1 Earnings Non-IFRS Revenue €9.56B, est. €9.53B Non-IFRS Cloud & Software Revenue €8.55B, est. €8.47B Non-IFRS Cloud Revenue €5.96B, est. €5.90B

data.title: Enova Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: The company experienced a significant growth in originations, with a 33% increase, leading to a 17% rise in total revenue compared to the first quarter of 2025. Diluted earnings per share also saw a notable increase of 29%, reaching $3.46, while adjusted earnings per share increased by 30% to $3.87 in the same period. Despite increasing financial performance, credit quality remained strong as indicated by a lower net...

data.title: One Tree Planted Wins Its First Webby Award for Viral 'Meet the Moment' Campaign
data.description: The recent 2026 People's Voice Award highlighted the urgency of restoring the world's forests as up to 40% of the planet's land is currently degraded. On April 21, just before the 56th Earth Day, public support for global reforestation efforts was evident, emphasizing the crucial need for action in preserving and rehabilitating forested areas worldwide.

data.title: The GEO Group Announces Date for First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: A company headquartered in Boca Raton, Fla., known as The GEO Group, Inc. (NYSE:GEO), is set to announce its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on Wednesday, May 6, 2026, before the trading day begins. To discuss these results, GEO has arranged a conference call and webcast at 11:00 AM (Eastern Time) on the same day. For those interested in joining the call, they can do so by dialing 1-877-250-1553 (U.S.) or 1-412-542-4145 (International) five minutes before the scheduled start time.
